name: bollard-mcp-vscode
description: Safe, stateful database access layer for VS Code / Cursor Copilot

bollard.mcpServer.enabled.description: Whether to register the Bollard MCP server with the editor.

bollard.mcpServer.pythonPath.description: Custom absolute path to the Python executable. If left empty, it will auto-detect the `.venv` directory in your open workspace.

bollard.mcpServer.defaultMaxRows.description: Default maximum rows returned by SELECT queries (Auto-LIMIT).

bollard.mcpServer.debug.description: Enable debug logging for the Bollard MCP server.
